message: Operation 'deleteDatabase' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks critical information about destructive side effects and irreversibility. Added explicit warnings about data loss and permanent removal to ensure AI agents understand the severity and consequences of this operation.

data.current_description: This endpoint deletes a Redis database.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a Redis database by its ID. Requires the database ID as a path parameter. This operation is irreversible and will remove all data stored in the database. The database will no longer be accessible after deletion.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical information about destructive side effects and irreversibility. Added explicit warnings about data loss and permanent removal to ensure AI agents understand the severity and consequences of this operation.

message: Operation 'resetDatabasePassword' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Enhanced to clarify the required ID parameter, explain what is returned (Database object with new credentials), and importantly, document the side effect that existing connections are invalidated. This is critical for AI agents to understand the operational impact.

data.current_description: This endpoint resets the password for a Redis database.
data.description_suggestion: Resets the authentication password for a Redis database identified by its ID. Requires the database ID as a path parameter. Returns the Database object with the new password credentials. All existing connections using the old password will be invalidated and must reconnect with the new credentials.
data.reasoning: Enhanced to clarify the required ID parameter, explain what is returned (Database object with new credentials), and importantly, document the side effect that existing connections are invalidated. This is critical for AI agents to understand the operational impact.
